# Overview {.unnumbered}

Exploration with MTE dataset

1. [Exploration of bibliometrix output](https://frbcesab.github.io/biblioscape/analysis/03_explore_bibliometrix.html)  
2. [Exploration of group member network](https://frbcesab.github.io/biblioscape/analysis/04a_explore_mte_members.html)



Exploration with CESAB dataset
2. [Exploration of group member network](https://frbcesab.github.io/biblioscape/analysis/04b_explore_cesab_members.html)
